title: rubus × gladiatus
intro: Rubus × gladiatus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or gladiolus raspberry, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the species Rubus idaeus and Rubus occidentalis. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Rubus × gladiatus include its ability to promote digestive health, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant, helping to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Rubus × gladiatus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, with the tea being a popular herbal remedy for its soothing effects on the digestive system.
